aids.title: HF-RMT-NC = 7 Application Domains
aids.content: **H**ealthcare, **F**inance, **R**etail, **M**anufacturing, **T**ransportation, **N**LP, **C**omputer Vision — Health Finance Runs Manufacturing Transport Networks Clearly

aids.title: Quick Technique-to-Application Map
aids.content: Images → CNN. Text → NLP models. Tables → Trees/Regression. Sequences → RNN/LSTM. Decisions → RL. No labels → Clustering.
aids.forRemembering: Mapping data types to ML techniques

aids.title: Top 5 Applications for Exams
aids.content: 1. Fraud detection (classification), 2. Disease diagnosis (CNN), 3. Recommendation systems (collaborative filtering), 4. Autonomous vehicles (RL+CNN), 5. Spam filtering (Naive Bayes)
aids.forRemembering: Most frequently asked applications in university exams
